title: Quadlet - add full support for Symlinks
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet now support symbolic links also inside the search path
```

Resolves: #23755

comments.body: couple of changes most of which @Luap99 points out; else LGTM
